metadata.description: Source-level architecture knowledge for Claude Code — 56 lessons covering hooks, permissions, agents, compaction, and more, verified against the v2.1.90 binary.

plugins.name: claude-code-internals
plugins.description: Gives Claude source-level knowledge of its own architecture. 56 lessons covering every internal subsystem — hooks (all 27 event types), permissions (7-phase pipeline, 23 validators), boot sequence, agents, compaction, MCP, memory, and binary-verified new features in v2.1.90. Searchable via RRF (keyword + TF-IDF fusion).
